title: helianthus debilis var. silvestris
intro: Helianthus debilis var. silvestris, also known as the Asian sunflower or beach sunflower, is a perennial plant native to East Asia that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Helianthus debilis var. silvestris include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its flowers, leaves, and roots are commonly used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
